title: Design System Sync — Schema Index
description: Index of all schemas under .claude/skills/design-system-sync/schema/. The input schema validates the normalized Figma MCP payload; the 2 contract schemas validate producer-side artifacts for Figma extraction and Webflow mapping. Shared schemas are referenced via $ref.

shared_schemas.name: RefEnvelope
shared_schemas.description: Meta + data envelope. Composed by the design-system contract schemas.

shared_schemas.name: Meta
shared_schemas.description: Provenance + identity block at the top of every contract.

shared_schemas.name: VariableEntry
shared_schemas.description: One design-token variable. Used by figma-design-system and webflow-design-system via $ref. Carries figmaId + modes + aliasOf.

shared_schemas.name: StyleEntry
shared_schemas.description: One text style. Used by figma-design-system and webflow-design-system via $ref.

contract_schemas.name: FigmaMcpVariableDefsInput
contract_schemas.description: Normalized get_variable_defs payload saved before Task 1 build. The agent may normalize MCP output into this shape, but must not invent missing variables, styles, ids, or values.

contract_schemas.name: FigmaDesignSystemContract
contract_schemas.description: Figma extraction. Composes ref-envelope + VariableEntry + StyleEntry. Built from the Figma MCP payload and the figma design-system template. BLOCK tier; must validate before mapping.

contract_schemas.name: WebflowDesignSystemContract
contract_schemas.description: Webflow mapping. Composes ref-envelope + VariableEntry + StyleEntry. Produced by map_variables.py from figma-design-system.json, the mapping guide, and the Webflow template. BLOCK tier; must validate before Webflow write.
